>   Hey,

> the 27th and maybe i could stay there a few days
> (depending on what you prefer). I'm so excited! I
> feel like I haven't seen her in forever. 
>  Enjoy Dubaii, I can't wait to hear all about it.
>  Love ya,
>  Dana B

body_html:
ok
--- danars07@aol.com wrote:

Hey,
How is your trip? I spoke to Simona about going to
Europe and I wanted to know if the dates were ok
with you. I would arrive in Madrid on the 24th
evening and then Simona and I would leave for Geneva
the 27th and maybe i could stay there a few days
(depending on what you prefer). I'm so excited! I
feel like I haven't seen her in forever.
Enjoy Dubaii, I can't wait to hear all about it.
Love ya,
Dana B
